user.title: Schiphol Runway Monitor
user.description:
Monitors which Schiphol runways are active using live LVNL data (updated every 5 minutes).

Source: {url}

data_description.scan_interval: How often to check LVNL for runway updates. Minimum 1, maximum 60. LVNL refreshes their data every 5 minutes.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Schiphol Runway Monitor instance is allowed.
